acceptance_targets: [award_01] Pass if, by the end of the revised closing movement anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:303 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:353, a first-time reader can point to one new relationship constraint or operating rule that did not already exist by snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:245. Fail if the ending only reconfirms the same two facts already established earlier in the chapter: the burn worsened and ordinary spellwork now misfires.

[craft_01] Pass if the revised common-room passage shows a visible social consequence beyond surprise and a single laugh: for example, someone moves their belongings, questions Owen directly, insists he stop casting, or Martha imposes a temporary wand boundary. Fail if the beat still resolves as apology, brief stillness, and immediate return to normal with no altered behavior in the room.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if, by the end of the revised closing movement anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:303 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:353, a first-time reader can point to one new relationship constraint or operating rule that did not already exist by snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:245. Fail if the ending only reconfirms the same two facts already established earlier in the chapter: the burn worsened and ordinary spellwork now misfires.
findings.problem: The greenhouse escalation is the chapter's artistic high point, but the final movement mostly reconfirms costs the reader already understands: the hand has worsened, the wand is unreliable, and closures keep misbehaving. The common-room beat and dormitory close are competent setup, yet they do not convert the disaster into a sharper relational or thematic turn, so the chapter finishes as proof-of-concept rather than a chapter whose ending reorders Owen's world at shortlist level.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rebuild the aftermath beginning around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:247, with the strongest leverage at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:303 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:353. Keep the established magical costs, but make the close produce one new irreversible consequence on the page: a changed boundary with Martha, a concrete self-limitation Owen imposes on his own practice, or another in-scene shift that is not just a restatement of deepened burn plus wand instability.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised common-room passage shows a visible social consequence beyond surprise and a single laugh: for example, someone moves their belongings, questions Owen directly, insists he stop casting, or Martha imposes a temporary wand boundary. Fail if the beat still resolves as apology, brief stillness, and immediate return to normal with no altered behavior in the room.
findings.problem: The common-room miscast lands too softly for occupied Hogwarts. Owen publicly causes multiple lids and clasps to spring open, but after a quick apology the room mostly treats it as odd entertainment. That undercuts the chapter's own claim that the First Art is dangerously incompatible with clean school spellwork; locally, the social consequence feels milder than the magical consequence.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the fallout centered on snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:303, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:313, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:325 so the room's response changes behavior instead of resetting. Keep Hufflepuff's ordinary texture, but give at least one student or Martha a concrete protective, suspicious, or disciplinary reaction that Owen must absorb in scene.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Preserve productive dialogue roughness; do not clean living speech into balanced thesis statements.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the premise's sharpest contradiction: school-year comedy, adolescent awkwardness, punitive cruelty, and cosmic dread may coexist in the same novel without canceling each other. When a scene offers a cleaner version and a truer version, choose the truer one unless the character is actively refusing perception on the page.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If pain, cruelty, fear, or moral ugliness would leave a bodily or environmental trace, render that trace instead of summarizing it into tasteful haze.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High. Contractions are the spoken norm for most characters; fuller forms are reserved for Snape, ritual language, or deliberate emphasis.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate scene density, dialogue load, and movement mode aggressively: confrontation against quiet meals, subterranean revelation against corridor farce, ritual compression against spring drift, so no consecutive chapters feel built from the same emotional or structural template.
prose_style_profile.diction: British boarding-school realism under wartime pressure, with speculative vocabulary introduced only when Owen's attention earns it.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third limited through Owen, with only brief sensory widenings that he could plausibly notice in the moment.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate analytic accumulation with blunt corporeal sentences. Quiet chapters should breathe; punishment and ritual chapters should tighten without clipping grammar.
